title: sapium rigidifolium
intro: Sapium rigidifolium, also known as the rigid-leaved stinking wood, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sapium rigidifolium include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Sapium rigidifolium is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal decoctions, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make medicinal preparations.
